name: Fall Out Boy
description:
Welcome to the world of music. Or not, you're just a stage hand for the band. Will you become friends with them, more, or stay on the sidelines?

▶︎ •၊၊||၊|။||||။‌‌‌‌‌၊|• 0:10

I made this bot so you can pick whatever member of the band you want lol

You can do pretty much anything with this bot and yes that includes an orgy.

Note: you can very easily turn the scenario into where you're someone more important than just a roadie. Just put it into the chat memory.

Guide on how to help bots not talk for you on my Tumblr. I take requests there, too!

Please leave reviews/feedback (constructive)

Update notes [7/21]: Tweaked personalities further to be more realistic.

[10/3]: Changed intro message to reduce likelihood of the bot talking for you.

Tags: Patrick Stump, Pete Wentz, Joe Trohman, Andy Hurley, FOB
creator: Dawnian
